name: io.github.BofAI/mcp-server-tron
description: MCP server for TRON blockchain. Supports TRX/TRC20 transfers, smart contracts, and AI prompts.

environmentVariables.name: AGENT_WALLET_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Master password for agent-wallet encrypted keystore (recommended for write operations)

environmentVariables.name: TRON_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Private key for the TRON wallet (legacy, optional)

environmentVariables.name: TRONGRID_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: TronGrid API Key for higher rate limits (optional)
